title: Scrapbook Territory Wrap-Up
excerpt: Last weekend I had the pleasure of flying up to Berkeley to teach once again at the fabulous Scrapbook Territory. I taught for the first time there back in November 2011 . It was wonderful to see some familiar faces…
body:
Last weekend I had the pleasure of flying up to Berkeley to teach once again at the fabulous Scrapbook Territory. I taught for the first time there back in November 2011. It was wonderful to see some familiar faces and of course meet new ones. My mom even decided to come along to help and really enjoyed herself. I am pretty sure everyone enjoyed meeting her as well.

Yes, we're wearing the same striped shirt from Old Navy in the photo above, just with different colored pants. You can see more about the day by watching Joboogie's vlog post and reading a post blogged by Jossie. If you were in the class and blogged about the day, please share in the comments. Thank you to everyone at Scrapbook Territory for having me again and congrats on celebrating your 10th anniversary! Remember to support your local stores, people! Of course thanks to everyone who came and spent their Saturday (or part of it) with me. And for those who smelled my shoes, you all have a very special place in my heart ;)
